title: Small Steps Create Momentum
short_teaser: Big changes often begin with very small steps.
story: Many accomplishments are created through small actions repeated consistently. A person does not build a business, learn a skill, or create something meaningful in one moment. Progress is usually built one decision at a time.
impact: Small wins create evidence that movement is happening. Progress does not have to be dramatic to be meaningful.
spark_application: What is one small step you can take today?
